title: How to build an AI-native org
speakers: Anique Drumright (Chief Product Officer, Harvey), Christina Nguyen White (VP, Design, Harvey), Gui Seiz (Design, Director, Figma)
key_points: A facilitated roundtable discussion led by the Harvey team on how AI is reshaping product development and blurring the boundaries between design and product.
Uses a small-group conversation format where participants openly share perspectives rather than a traditional one-way presentation.
Explores evolving organizational structures and changing hiring dynamics in AI-native companies.
Examines what it means to build in a world where anyone can create.
